command.text: find /testbed -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.txt' -exec wc -w {} + | awk '$1<2000{sum+=$1; n++} END{print n?sum/n:"0"}'

Command: find /testbed -maxdepth 1 -name '*.txt' -type f -exec wc -w {} + | awk 'NR>1{sum+=$1; n++} END{print n?sum/n:"0"}' but need to filter <2000. So pipe to awk to filter. task.query: Compute the mean average of the word count of *.txt files smaller than 2000 words in the /testbed directory
task.gold: find /testbed  -name '*.txt' -print0 | xargs -0 wc -w | awk '$1 < 2000 {v += $1; c++} END {print v/c}'
